tier_rationale: Documentation-only update to require Korean session logs in the harness guides.
request_summary: Add an explicit rule that session logs must be written in Korean and not English.
goal: Prevent future session logs from switching to English by encoding the rule in the guide documents.

positive: Update the guide documents that govern session logs.
Keep the rule explicit and easy to find.
Update authority versions if document headers change.
negative: Do not touch secrets or runtime configuration.
Do not revert unrelated user edits.

success_criteria: The guide documents state that session logs must be written in Korean.
Authority versions in CURRENT_STATE.md match the updated document headers.

context.initial_status_summary: Clean worktree on main after TASK-20260426-080 push completion.
